title: Circle's policy chief tells UK to merge MiCA clarity with US stablecoin rules
message_html: Circle's policy chief tells UK to merge MiCA clarity with US stablecoin rules ...
snippet: The UK has a unique opportunity to merge the best of the EU’s MiCA framework and the US GENIUS Act, Circle’s Dante Disparte told the House of Lords committee on Wednesday.
